pi_items.source: Checked setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which explicitly use these exact file paths.
Verified the download URLs in setup_task.sh point to the sentinel-cogs AWS bucket and downloaded the files to confirm they are valid Sentinel-2 10m resolution bands (EPSG:32631, 10980x10980 shape).

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real Sentinel-2 Level-2A data, specifically B04 (Red) and B08 (NIR) from tile 31TGM (December 2020). The data is downloaded from the official sentinel-cogs open data registry on AWS and saved to the expected local paths '/home/ga/snap_data/sentinel2_B04_red.tif' and '/home/ga/snap_data/sentinel2_B08_nir.tif'.
